requirements.text: The system shall allow maximum one coupon on an `order_id`.
When the user applies a `coupon_id`, the system shall validate expiry, used state, and minimum order amount.
While an order is `draft`, the system shall allow the user to apply coupon and remove coupon.
If the user submits an already used coupon, then the system shall return a rejection error.
If item removal makes `total_amount` fall below the minimum order amount after coupon application, then the system shall detach the coupon and notify the user.
If an order is cancelled, then the system shall restore the coupon to unused state.
If a `cancelled` order is submitted for confirmation, then the system shall reject the transition.
If a discount would make `total_amount` negative, then the system shall set `total_amount` to zero and report the adjustment.
Where a premium entitlement is present, the system shall apply the premium discount after coupon validation.
